name: healthcare_classroom_monitoring_stonehaven_st_lt
premise: Medical records flagged conflicting allergy entries; anesthesia refuses to proceed without a single reconciled source of truth. In Healthcare, the situation tagged internally around healthcare classroom monitoring stonehaven st lt has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both short term and long term; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Priya Navarro
agents.identity: I am Priya Navarro, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Healthcare. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Jonah Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Jonah Vasquez, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Healthcare. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so long term does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so short term does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Priya Navarro must choose under short term versus long term. What does Priya Navarro do?
